name: Toasted Country Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Brush both sides of the bread slices lightly with olive oil.
3. Place the bread on a rack set over a cookie sheet and put it in the oven.
4. Toast for 10-15 minutes, or until the bread begins to brown slightly.
5. Spread tomato salad over the toast and serve.
